description: Claude Code hooks for PDP project

hooks.name: update-docs-on-archive
hooks.description: Update docs when OpenSpec changes are archived
hooks.notes: Scans archived change for spec modifications and flags docs that may need manual sync

setup.instructions: Configure this hook in Claude Code settings:
steps: Go to Claude Code Settings (or user settings)
Add this command that runs after /opsx:archive completes:
bash scripts/hooks/update-docs-on-archive.sh $(basename openspec/changes/archive/$(ls -td openspec/changes/archive/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs -I {} basename {}))
